cli_missing.likely_cause: Local development dependencies are not installed or not on PATH.

launcher_unreachable.likely_cause: The local runtime launcher is not running.

launcher_unhealthy.symptom: Launcher health endpoint returned an unhealthy payload
launcher_unhealthy.likely_cause: The launcher started but one of its dependencies is not healthy.

orchestrator_unreachable.likely_cause: The local orchestrator is not running.

orchestrator_unhealthy.symptom: Orchestrator health endpoint returned an unhealthy payload
orchestrator_unhealthy.likely_cause: The orchestrator started but did not report a healthy status.

port_collision.symptom: A runtime port is owned by an unexpected process
port_collision.likely_cause: Another local process is using a port needed by the runtime stack.

env_missing.symptom: No local runtime .env file was found
env_missing.likely_cause: The worktree has not been configured with local runtime credentials.
next_steps: copy .env from the main repo or another configured worktree

log_missing.symptom: Expected runtime log file is missing
log_missing.likely_cause: The local runtime has not been started from this worktree.

log_stale.symptom: Expected runtime log file is stale
log_stale.likely_cause: The local runtime has not written logs recently or is running from another worktree.

local_runtime_not_ready.symptom: Local runtime helper is not ready for the requested workspace
local_runtime_not_ready.likely_cause: No helper is connected for this workspace, the target runner kind is not registered, or the requested model/capabilities are unavailable.
